seo.title: Trade Book Printing | Quarterfold Printabilities
seo.description: Premium trade-book printing by Quarterfold: coffee-table books, notebooks, leather diaries, calendars, autobiographies and novels. Request a quote.

hero.title: Trade Books
hero.ledeBold: These are bound to be kept.

delivery: Export-ready from our Taloja and Vashi facilities — printed, packed, palletised and shipped to educational and trade partners in 25+ countries.

range.sub: Jump between categories, or step across to a sibling service.

coffee-table.name: Coffee-Table Books
coffee-table.story: Made to be left out, not shelved.
coffee-table.craft: Case-bound and hand-finished, with foil blocking and embossing on cloth and board covers — the expert binding that lets a large-format book lie flat and open true.
coffee-table.materials: Premium coated and uncoated paper stocks, printed 4-colour process on offset presses, then dressed with metallic foils and spot UV.
coffee-table.options: Portrait or landscape formats, custom trim sizes, matte or gloss lamination, and specialty finishes to order.

notebooks.name: Premium Notebooks
notebooks.craft: Perfect bound or case bound, with debossed and embossed covers and foil-blocked detailing — counterbooks, pads and branded stationery built to be used daily.
notebooks.materials: Premium paper stocks with ruled, dotted or plain interiors; leatherette, cloth and board covers finished with foil.
notebooks.options: A6 to A4 and bespoke sizes, rounded corners, elastic closures and ribbon markers, printed or blind-blocked.

diaries.name: Leather Diaries
diaries.craft: Luxury leather-case, hard-bound and soft-bound builds, foil blocked and embossed by hand — the expert binding techniques that make a diary last a year and beyond.
diaries.materials: Genuine and bonded leather cases over premium paper stocks, with gilt and matte foil edging.
diaries.options: Dated or undated, week-to-view or day-per-page, with elastic bands, pen loops and personalised foil.

calendars.name: Calendars
calendars.craft: Saddle-stitched and wire-bound wall calendars, printed 4-colour process with foil and spot UV accents on the cover month.
calendars.materials: Heavyweight coated stocks for the image months, board backing, and metal or wire-o binding.
calendars.options: Wall, desk and landscape formats, custom grids, and bespoke trim sizes to order.

autobiographies.name: Autobiographies
autobiographies.craft: Case bound with printed or foil-blocked jackets, offset printed and hand-finished — heritage and collector's editions built to be kept.
autobiographies.materials: Cream and white book-wove paper stocks, printed cloth or board covers, head and tail bands, and foiled spines.
autobiographies.options: Royal, demy and custom trim sizes, dust jackets, ribbon markers and slipcases to order.

novels.name: Novels
novels.craft: Perfect bound on offset and lithographic presses — trade paperbacks and hardbacks, printed clean and bound to open flat.
novels.materials: Book-wove and bulk paper stocks, matte or gloss laminated covers, with foil and spot UV options.
novels.options: A-format to royal, French flaps, custom trims, and short or long print runs.
